title: taraxacum lacistrum
intro: Taraxacum lacistrum, also known as the rough dandelion or lacustrine dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum lacistrum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum lacistrum often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms of liver and digestive disorders.
